$comment: Mechanically-enforced gate baselines (see EVALS.md rules). run-routing.mjs prints a gate verdict on every run and exits 1 on breach when invoked with --gate (CI does). Re-baselining is an explicit act: update these numbers in the same commit as the change that moves them, with the decision recorded in Solo (EVALS.md rule 1). Counts are absolute hits, not percentages.
note: re-baselined 2026-07-12 on Scout OpenAPI 1.7.15 → 1.7.16 (GitHub issue #21; Solo scratchpad 605, adversarial review in 606): the upstream sls-051 structural fix — no operation added/removed/renamed, no schema or exposure or runner change; 17 operation descriptions rewritten as terse ≤600-char purpose statements with the routing vocabulary MOVED to a machine-readable x-routing extension {purpose, keywords, useWhen, notFor, exampleQuestions}. Absorbed together with scoring lever 7 (routingKeywords catalog field: x-routing purpose/useWhen/exampleQuestions/keywords scored as an independent augmented pass at blend 1.0, cap 128, no DF filter — chosen by A/B sweep: bare absorb 185/241/285, merged-into-keywords@0.4 185/244/287, 0.8+DF+cap64 191/250/295, 1.0+DF+cap64 194/255/298, 1.0+noDF+cap64 197/260/297, 0.9+noDF+cap128 201/263, 1.0+noDF+cap128 205/272/305; notFor deliberately excluded as cross-op vocabulary). Main 213/271/304 → 205/272/305 (-8/+1/+1). Honest decomposition (verified per-case by the grok-4.5 adversarial review): the bare absorb loses 50 scout-expected top-1s; lever 7 recovers 20 of them (30 residual); 22 docs/lumenloop capture-relief gains (the exact fix sls-051 requested) all hold; net -50+20+22 = -8. NOT laundered as a win: legacy scout-scope top1 falls 67 → 37, printed accept-either top1 268 → 236, card@5 100 → 89; extended strict improves 71/101/107 → 85/102/109 but by composition shift (docs 49 → 81, scout 22 → 4); skills 18 → 19/23/23. The upstream deleted the prose the 30 residual cases routed on and x-routing does not carry their vocabulary — no blend setting recovers them (sweep above); accepted as the honest new floor with the curation gap filed upstream as sls-052. Prior baseline: routing-2026-07-11T18-53-06-914Z.json (Scout 1.7.15 drift, issue #19).
